title: satureja montana subsp. innota
intro: Satureja montana subsp. innota, also known as mountain savory, is a subspecies of the Satureja montana plant, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of mountain savory include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its potential to improve digestion, reduce stress, and promote relaxation. Mountain savory can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbalism to support overall well-being and health.
